title: バクシンロードは続く！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O has managed to leave quite a
mark on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while we bask in the glory of our
victories...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! This way, over here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Sakura Bakushin O's suggestion, the two of us
pay a visit to a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This sakura mochi is super yummy! It's sure to
shock your taste buds!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'll go buy some, so please, a moment!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, no! Today I want to thank you for your
efforts, so allow me to handle it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That being said...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...could you please lend me some money?! I seem
to have forgotten my wallet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sakura mochi has a delicate sweetness to it.
It's very tasty, just like she said.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that was delicious. ♪ This shrine has the
best sakura mochi around!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
They're about as good as the ones my mom
makes, which is pretty amazing!
choice_data_list: Your mother must be very kind.
Your mother must be very kind.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes, she is!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, I've been thinking about
something. Something I haven't told anyone
about...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Like, isn't sakura mochi the most delicious mochi
out there? It's basically the best in its class!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Perhaps it was... named after me?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I, too, am the cream of the crop... is that why they called it sakura mochi?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: If so, then it tastes all the sweeter in my eyes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My mom must've definitely made sakura mochi
for me while thinking the same thing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I know even now she's kneading mochi, waiting
for me...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
For me to become somebody who is worthy of
being called a role model...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well, these days I'd say I'm quite the example!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But it was you, Trainer. You're the one who
helped me grow this much.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To be honest with you, Trainer, there was a time
when I had my doubts about you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I thought, "Will they insist I stick to sprints, just
like all the others?"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: But I decided to believe in you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And because I did, I've managed to run this far.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I really did cross the 3,600 meter mark! How's
that for someone to look up to!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Let me ask you this one question.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you believe in me?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The Twin Tenno Sho and Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And all the other races I'll enter, you believe... I'll
win, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I answer her question straightaway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she continues to work on her speed, dashing
past the competition at an untouchable pace...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then there isn't a single race out there she can't
win. And one day she'll make it to the top!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I've been waiting to hear those words!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Here's to training with you from here on out!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Our goal—complete Bakushin Road domination!
Yeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Until we make our dream come true, the two of us
will Bakushin on!
